heading: Congressional testimony by employees: treatment as official duty
label: 715 Congressional testimony by employees: treatment as official duty
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 715 and 716 were renumbered sections 1915 and 1916 of this title, respectively.

children.heading: .—Congressional Testimony
children.label: a .—Congressional Testimony
children.text: An employee of the Department is performing official duty during the period with respect to which the employee is testifying in an official capacity in front of either chamber of Congress, a committee of either chamber of Congress, or a joint or select committee of Congress.

children.heading: .—Travel Expenses
children.label: b .—Travel Expenses
children.text: The Secretary shall provide travel expenses, including per diem in lieu of subsistence, in accordance with applicable provisions under subchapter I of chapter 57 of title 5, to any employee of the Department of Veterans Affairs performing official duty described under subsection (a).
